summary: The user is seeking recommendations for unique artwork for their living room and is cautious about browsing online to avoid coffee spills, referencing a past incident on January 25th. They also inquire about tips for choosing the right frame for their artwork, hanging it straight, and creating a cozy reading nook in their living room.
facts: The user is looking for unique artwork for their living room. The user spilled coffee on the carpet on January 25th. The user is considering a floating frame for their new artwork. The user has a low-profile coffee table in their living room. The user recently swapped the armchair and coffee table in their living room. The user wants to create a cozy reading nook in their living room. The user is interested in tips for hanging artwork straight and level. The user plans to mock up different frame styles to see what looks best with their coffee table. The user is considering rearranging the furniture in their living room again.
